name: Dried Tomato & Rosemary Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Snipped dried tomatoes (unsalted, not packed in oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients as specified.
2. Place the water and dried tomatoes in the bread machine pan first.
3. Add the olive oil, salt, bread flour, nonfat dry milk powder, granulated sugar, dried rosemary, paprika, and bread machine yeast to the bread machine.
4. Follow the machine's directions for baking.
5. Once finished, allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
Per serving: 106 calories, 4g protein, 19g carbohydrates, 2g (14%) fat, 1mg cholesterol, 199mg sodium.
